useful_deltas.summary: Added a dry-run-only, structure-pure pre-registration adapter that stress-tests every transient evolve SHIP through baseline, B3, percentage-cost, fixed-cost, max-loss, window-drawdown, and dense-negative gates while withholding registration without chronological holdout proof.

One fixed-seed 36-DNA dry search across eight symbols and four defined-risk structures produced three transient SHIPs, all rejected before registry mutation; complete proxy gates and registration eligibility were both zero.

Repaired capital semantics so capital_fit_usd is observed one-lot required capital rather than sleeve size, separated sleeve/open-risk fields, and added explicit unsupported-structure and multi-symbol fail-closed boundaries.

critic_findings.finding: F1: capital_fit_usd was hard-coded to the $3,000 sleeve instead of derived from observed one-lot capital required.
critic_findings.rationale: The regenerated payload reports capital_fit_usd equal to one_lot_max_loss_usd for all three rows ($192.60/$195.78/$199.56), with sleeve_usd and open-risk budget separate; operating max_lots remains one.

critic_findings.finding: F2: raw evolve SHIP rows can have negative composite scores.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a code defect or reason to retune evolve: the source rows explicitly use reason=positive_sim while drawdown penalties drive score negative. The dry pre-registration gate treats SHIP only as a stress trigger, and the lesson is promoted to trader-self-evolution.

critic_findings.finding: F3: focused tests lacked explicit multi-symbol and unsupported-structure rejection boundaries.
critic_findings.rationale: Added both fail-closed cases; the focused suite now passes 8/8 before any market-data load or stress execution.

critic_findings.finding: F4: SNAP baseline labeling might be imprecise because full-history PnL was positive while verdict was NULL.
critic_findings.rationale: The evidence artifact explicitly reports full_history pnl=31.09, verdict=NULL, failed baseline_positive_non_vacuous_ship, and failed regime_soft_hold. The reports describe failure of the SHIP/base gate, not negative PnL, so no contradictory claim remains.

data_dependencies: Chronological train-only evolve selection and untouched-holdout evaluation are required before any transient proxy SHIP can become registration-eligible.

Observed historical option replay remains independently blocked at two of three TSLL market dates; that limit applies to provider-backed replay/L1 claims, not this L0 historical-underlying capability.
next: Build one chronological pre-registration adapter that performs fixed-seed train-only free defined-risk multi-structure evolve selection and evaluates every selected DNA once on an untouched chronological holdout with the existing absolute gates; require train AND holdout, register nothing on the first pass, keep proxy/L0 labels, and do not reopen closed families or paper/shadow/arm/live.
